summary: Frontend-only verification of Account Settings UX cleanup (Task Prompt 7, option 'a'). Logged in as doctor@ccms.app, navigated to /security?tab=security, and exercised the rearranged Security tab. All acceptance criteria pass: (1) Profile/Security/Licenses tabs still render and are clickable — Profile and Licenses tabs also mount without error. (2) New security-posture-strip renders at the top with all three tiles posture-tile-mfa / posture-tile-pin / posture-tile-pwage (MFA=OFF, PIN=NOT SET, Password age=1 DAY visible). (3) DOM order verified: strip < signin-methods-group < session-activity-group. (4) Both section headings 'Sign-in methods' and 'Session activity & posture' are visible above their card groups. (5) Pills render with correct copy: 'PRIMARY LOGIN CREDENTIAL' on Password, 'EXTRA SIGN-IN CHECK' on Two-factor auth, 'IN-APP ONLY' on PIN; PIN description explicitly states 'does not replace your password' and 'cannot be used to sign in'. (6) Old password-age-banner testid is cleanly removed (now surfaced via posture-tile-pwage). (7) All regression test-ids preserved: pw-current/new/confirm/submit-btn + *-toggle, mfa-start-btn → mfa-qr-image + mfa-secret-text + mfa-verify-code + mfa-verify-btn, pin-set-btn → pin-create-dialog (pin-dialog-password, pin-create-new, pin-create-confirm, pin-create-submit), sessions-card with session-row-0. (8) Accessibility: 0 unmatched inputs (every input id has a <label for=id> pairing — verified across entire page), password toggles expose aria-pressed + aria-label='Show password'/'Hide password' + aria-controls, pw-mismatch-hint has aria-live='polite' + role='alert', MFA code input has inputMode='numeric' + pattern='\d{6}' + maxLength=6 + autocomplete='one-time-code'. Backend suite NOT re-run per reviewer's instruction (known green 94/94 from iteration_45).
critical_code_review_comments: SecurityTab.jsx PasswordField: inputId is derived from testId ('${testId}-input') and every <Label htmlFor> matches — clean pattern, no id collisions across the 3 password fields.
aria-pressed={show} is correctly bound to React state on the show/hide toggles (line 256), so the attribute flips on interaction — confirmed attribute present and initialised to 'false'.

Inline error paragraphs (pw-same-as-current-hint, pw-mismatch-hint) carry BOTH role='alert' AND aria-live='polite' — screen readers will announce them as soon as they mount. Good redundancy without being double-announced (role=alert implies assertive live region by default, but since the element is conditionally mounted on invalid state, 'polite' is appropriate here; acceptable).
MFA code input has inputMode='numeric' + pattern='\d{6}' + maxLength=6 + autocomplete='one-time-code' — matches WCAG/WAI numeric-only best practice and lets iOS/Android pop the numeric keypad.

PinCard description now reads 'does not replace your password ... cannot be used to sign in' — the copy is correctly re-scoped so users cannot misread PIN as a login credential. Pill 'IN-APP ONLY' reinforces this at the header level.

SecurityPostureStrip is self-contained inside SecurityTab.jsx (~80 LOC sub-component). File is still 757 lines — borderline; splitting PasswordChangeCard + MfaCard + RecentSignInsCard into their own files would bring it under the 700-line guideline and improve maintainability, but this is non-blocking.

One minor suggestion: the warn tone for 'MFA OFF' posture tile uses bg-warning-soft text-foreground — visually it reads identically to the muted tone in dark mode because foreground isn't contrasted against warning-soft. Consider bg-warning-soft text-warning (or similar) so the 'warn' vs 'muted' distinction is more visible. Not a blocker — info is still legible.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — 30/30 assertions passed across structure, copy, test-ids, flows, and a11y

seed_data_creation: None — read-only navigation + opened MFA-setup panel and PIN-create dialog (dismissed without submit, so no server-side state created)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Task Prompt 7 UX cleanup is fully green on the frontend. If future iterations touch SecurityTab.jsx again, the file is already at 757 LOC — splitting the three cards into sibling files will help keep it under the 700-line guideline. The MFA 'warn' tile colour pair (bg-warning-soft / text-foreground) looks almost identical to the muted tile in dark mode; consider distinct warning foreground for higher-contrast posture signalling. Backend was not touched and was NOT re-run this iteration per reviewer instruction.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bug. UX cleanup verified structurally (DOM ordering + testids), copy-wise (pills + PIN disclaimer), flow-wise (all existing test-ids reachable, MFA setup + PIN create dialog open cleanly), and accessibility-wise (label/id pairings, aria-live, aria-pressed, inputMode/pattern on MFA code).
